title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 513.140 - Personal property subject to execution for purchase price, when
text:
513.140.  Personal property subject to execution for purchase price, when. — Personal property shall in all cases be subject to execution on a judgment against the purchaser for the purchase price thereof, and shall in no case be exempt from such judgment and execution, except in the hands of an innocent purchaser, for value, without notice of the existence of such prior claim for the purchase money.
(RSMo 1939 § 1335) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1171; 1919 § 1622; 1909 § 2191
